root.speaker: Crier of the Day
root.text:
Today's notice. Hear ye:

"Welcome to the Wyrdmark. Watch your step."

two.speaker: Crier of the Day
two.text:
"Maintenance window: never. The realm has been up since
anyone can remember and will be up tomorrow."

three.speaker: Crier of the Day
three.text: "Today is a good day to whistle."

four.speaker: Crier of the Day
four.text:
"The realm thanks you for your trust."

That's all I have today. The board only takes four.

props.message:
A banner stretches overhead, freshly painted:

"Welcome to the Wyrdmark. Watch your step."

Message of the Day —

Read once on entry. Replaced at dawn. The day's word, no more.

A small ledger of past banners hangs by the door.

Yesterday: "Mind the kettle."
The day before: "It is raining somewhere. Take a kindness."
